steps.t: Bandrauth Adder-fang can be found within Tûr Ágal at Caivád Sâr. Múta has asked you to find and defeat the Angmarim sorcerer, Bandrauth Adder-fang, in…
The dusty pedestal can be found in the highest chamber of Tûr Ágal. You have not found Bandrauth Adder-fang, but you have discovered a curious, dusty …
Múta can be found outside Caivád Sâr in northern Elderslade. You wounded Bandrauth Adder-fang, but he was able to escape from his encounter with you. …
